products.name: Hei-VAP Core Rotary Evaporator
products.metaDescription: Hei-VAP Core Rotary Evaporator from Heidolph — digital display, dual control knobs, LED ring light system, and hand or motor lift models for everyday distillation, concentration, and purification.
products.overview: The Hei-VAP Core Rotary Evaporator is engineered for essential, everyday distillation tasks. It combines reliability, safety, and simplicity—making it the perfect choice for routine applications in research and industry. Designed with a clean operating concept and high visibility, it allows users to monitor and adjust critical parameters with ease.
features: Clear Digital Display: Easily monitor actual and set values for both rotation speed and heating bath temperature.

Dual Control Knobs with Dynamic Tuning: Separate knobs provide intuitive control — fast rotation for quick changes, slow rotation for precision adjustments, and a lock function to prevent accidental value changes.
Intuitive LED Ring Light System: Illuminated indicators show active functions from a distance, ensuring quick and clear status checks.
Manual Immersion and Inclination Adjustment: Flexible immersion depth up to 155 mm and inclination angle from 20° to 80° to support a wide range of evaporation needs.
Standby Function & Residual Heat Warning: Automatic safety features halt operations and warn the user when bath temperatures exceed 50 °C.
Available in Hand or Motor Lift Models: Choose between a manual hand lift or automated motor lift version depending on your operational preferences.
Hand Lift Model with G3 Vertical Glassware: Offers efficient vertical condensation, ideal for standard distillation processes.
Simplified Operation: Minimalistic and intuitive controls reduce the learning curve, enabling lab personnel to operate the system efficiently with minimal training.
Enhanced Visibility & Safety: The integrated LED ring light provides instant visual feedback on system status, while the residual heat warning alerts users when bath temperatures exceed safe levels.
Precision Control: Dual dynamic control knobs allow fast or fine-tuned adjustments to rotation speed and temperature without navigating complicated digital menus.
Space-Saving Vertical Glassware: The G3 vertical glassware setup offers efficient condensation while minimizing equipment footprint, supporting faster solvent recovery.
Flexible & Adaptable: Adjustable immersion depth up to 155 mm and inclination angle from 20° to 80° accommodate a variety of flask sizes and sample volumes.
Cost-Effective for Routine Applications: Balances performance and affordability, offering high-value functionality for labs looking to maximize return on investment.
